question_tagalog: Tingin mo ba madali tayong magkasundo pagdating sa pera?
question_english: Do you think we easily agree when it comes to money?
quote_tagalog: Financial stability ang goal natin pareho.
quote_english: Financial stability is our shared goal.

question_tagalog: Pareho ba tayo ng opinion sa dream house at saan titira?
question_english: Do we have the same opinion on our dream house and where to live?
quote_tagalog: Kahit saan basta kasama kita, uuwian ko.
quote_english: Anywhere as long as I'm with you, I'll come home.

question_tagalog: Tugma ba ang love languages natin sa isa't isa?
question_english: Are our love languages compatible with each other?
quote_tagalog: Hahanapin ko ang language kung saan ka mas sasaya.
quote_english: I will find the language where you will be happier.

question_tagalog: Magkasundo ba tayo sa ideal na weekends or rest days?
question_english: Do we agree on what makes an ideal weekend or rest day?
quote_tagalog: Kahit sa bahay lang tayo, sapat na yon.
quote_english: Even just staying at home is enough.

question_tagalog: Ano ang pinaka malaking pagkakaiba natin in a good way?
question_english: What is our biggest difference in a good way?
quote_tagalog: Kahit magkaiba, nagkakaintindihan parin tayo.
Even if we're different, we still understand each other.

question_tagalog: Compatible ba yung travel styles natin feeling mo?
question_english: Do you feel like our travel styles are compatible?
quote_tagalog: Handang maligaw basta ikaw ang kasama.
quote_english: Ready to get lost as long as you're with me.

question_tagalog: Pareho ba tayo pamilyado o mas gusto sariling buhay?
question_english: Are we both family-oriented or prefer our own life?
quote_tagalog: Ikaw na ang pamilya ko ngayon.
quote_english: You are my family now.

question_tagalog: Gaano tayo ka-aligned kung pano mag-raise ng aso o anak in the future?
question_english: How aligned are we on raising a dog or child in the future?
quote_tagalog: Sabay natin aalagaan nang may pagmamahal.
quote_english: We will raise them together with love.

question_tagalog: Kung ikaw extrovert ako introvert, nag work ba to satin?
question_english: If you're an extrovert and I'm an introvert, did this work for us?
quote_tagalog: Balanced tayo, yin at yang sa pag-ibig.
quote_english: We are balanced, yin and yang in love.

question_tagalog: Magkasundo ba tayo pano tapusin ang away bago matulog?
question_english: Do we agree on how to end an argument before sleeping?
quote_tagalog: Wag na tayo matulog nang magkagalit ha.
quote_english: Let's not sleep angry at each other.

question_tagalog: Parehas ba tayong emotional o logical magdesisyon?
question_english: Are we both emotional or logical in making decisions?
quote_tagalog: Minsan puso, minsan isip, pero palaging ikaw.
quote_english: Sometimes heart, sometimes mind, but always you.

question_tagalog: Compatible ba yung career goals at time for relationship natin?
question_english: Are our career goals and time for relationship compatible?
quote_tagalog: Kahit busy, palaging may time sayo.
quote_english: Even if busy, there's always time for you.

question_tagalog: Parehas ba tayong malinis or medyo makalat sa kwarto?
question_english: Are we both neat or a bit messy in our room?
quote_tagalog: Aayusin ko ang makalat kong buhay para satin.
quote_english: I'll fix my messy life for us.

question_tagalog: Pagdating sa diet at pagkain, gaano tayo kaimposibleng magkasundo?
question_english: When it comes to diet and food, how impossible is it for us to agree?
quote_tagalog: Ako nalang taga-ubos ng tira mo.
quote_english: I'll just be the one to finish your leftovers.

question_tagalog: Pareho ba tayo ng pace pag naglalakad at nagku-kwentuhan?
question_english: Do we have the same pace when walking and chatting?
quote_tagalog: Sabay tayo lalakad nang magkahawak-kamay.
quote_english: We will walk together holding hands.

question_tagalog: Compatible ba yung sense of humor natin pag tayong dalawa lang?
question_english: Is our sense of humor compatible when it's just the two of us?
quote_tagalog: Yung mga walang kwentang jokes natin, the best parin.
quote_english: Our nonsense jokes are still the best.

question_tagalog: Parehas ba tayo palaging late o maaga sa dates?
question_english: Are we both always late or early to dates?
quote_tagalog: Maghihintay parin ako kahit gaano ka pa katagal.
quote_english: I will wait no matter how long you take.

question_tagalog: Tugma ba ang tulog habits natin (night owl vs early bird)?
question_english: Do our sleep habits match (night owl vs early bird)?
quote_tagalog: Puyat ako basta ikaw ang kausap.
quote_english: I'll stay up late as long as I'm talking to you.

question_tagalog: Magkasundo ba tayo sa religious or spiritual beliefs natin?
question_english: Do we get along with our religious or spiritual beliefs?
quote_tagalog: Respetuhin natin as long as pareho tayong mabuti.
quote_english: Let's respect as long as we're both good.

question_tagalog: Parehas ba tayong mahilig lumabas o mas gusto sa bahay?
question_english: Are we both into going out or prefer staying at home?
quote_tagalog: Bahay na tayo, kape at kwentuhan.
quote_english: Let's stay home, coffee and stories.

question_tagalog: Ano ang inakala kong hindi tayo magkakasundo, pero swak pala?
question_english: What did I think we wouldn't agree on, but actually fit perfectly?
quote_tagalog: Unexpected na mas gumanda ang takbo ng barko.
quote_english: Unexpected that the ship sailed even better.

question_tagalog: Gaano tayo katugma pagdating sa paboritong movies at shows?
question_english: How compatible are we when it comes to favorite movies and shows?
quote_tagalog: Papanuorin ko kahit anong gusto mong panuorin.
quote_english: I will watch whatever you want to watch.

question_tagalog: Pareho ba tayong mahaba ang pasensya sa isa't isa?
question_english: Do we both have a lot of patience for each other?
quote_tagalog: Titiisin ang lahat, wag lang ikaw na mawala.
quote_english: Will endure everything, just not losing you.

question_tagalog: Magkasundo ba tayo kung sino saatin ang laging tama?
question_english: Do we agree on who among us is always right?
quote_tagalog: Sige na nga, lagi ka namang tama.
quote_english: Fine, you're always right anyway.

question_tagalog: Parehas ba tayo umasa sa gut feeling kaysa logic minsan?
question_english: Do we both rely on gut feeling rather than logic sometimes?
quote_tagalog: It feels right na ikaw ang pinili ko.
quote_english: It feels right that I chose you.

question_tagalog: Compatible ba yung level ng pagiging spontaneous at planner natin?
question_english: Is our level of being spontaneous and planner compatible?
quote_tagalog: Plano man o biglaan, siguradong masaya.
quote_english: Planned or sudden, it's surely fun.

question_tagalog: Gaano tayo nagkakasundo sa social energy nating dalawa?
question_english: How well do we agree on both of our social energies?
quote_tagalog: Mag-charge tayo ng energy na magkasama.
quote_english: Let's recharge our energy together.

question_tagalog: Parehas ba tayong matipid o magastos paminsan-minsan?
question_english: Are we both thrifty or spendthrifts occasionally?
quote_tagalog: Okay lang gumastos basta para sayo.
quote_english: It's okay to spend as long as it's for you.

question_tagalog: Tugma ba ang pananaw natin kung anong meaning ng success?
question_english: Do our views match on what the meaning of success is?
quote_tagalog: Ang success para sakin ay ang makasama ka.
quote_english: Success for me is being with you.

question_tagalog: Magkasundo ba tayo sa paboritong music genres habang nasa byahe?
question_english: Do we agree on our favorite music genres while traveling?
quote_tagalog: Ikaw ang pinaka paborito kong kanta.
quote_english: You are my absolute favorite song.

question_tagalog: Pareho ba tayo kung paano mag-relax sa stressful days?
question_english: Are we the same in how we relax on stressful days?
quote_tagalog: Yakap mo palang tanggal na ang pagod ko.
quote_english: Just your hug takes away my exhaustion.

question_tagalog: Tugma ba tayo sa level of cleanliness sa bahay natin balang araw?
question_english: Are we compatible with the level of cleanliness in our future home?
quote_tagalog: Maglilinis ako palagi para presko ka sa bahay.
quote_english: I'll always clean so you feel fresh at home.

question_tagalog: Compatible ba yung communication style natin pag masaya at pag malungkot?
question_english: Is our communication style compatible when happy and sad?
quote_tagalog: Makikinig palagi kahit anong mood mo pa.
quote_english: Will always listen whatever your mood is.

question_tagalog: Magkasundo ba tayo tungkol sa boundaries sa mga opposite gender friends?
question_english: Do we agree on boundaries with opposite gender friends?
quote_tagalog: Loyalty at trust ang importante satin.
quote_english: Loyalty and trust are important to us.

question_tagalog: Gaano tayo katugma pagdating sa paboritong panahon or weather?
question_english: How compatible are we when it comes to favorite seasons or weather?
quote_tagalog: Ulan man o araw, holding hands parin.
quote_english: Rain or shine, still holding hands.

question_tagalog: Parehas ba tayong competitive kapag naglalaro ng games?
question_english: Are we both competitive when playing games?
quote_tagalog: Kahit matalo, basta ikaw kalaro, panalo narin.
quote_english: Even if I lose, as long as it's you, it's a win.

question_tagalog: Magkasundo ba tayo pano natin ise-celebrate ang anniversaries natin?
question_english: Do we agree on how we celebrate our anniversaries?
quote_tagalog: Araw araw ay parang anniversary kung ikaw ang kasama.
quote_english: Every day is like an anniversary with you.

question_tagalog: Tugma ba tayo in terms of dealing with mga toxic na relatives?
question_english: Are we compatible in terms of dealing with toxic relatives?
quote_tagalog: Tayo laban sa mundo, poprotektahan kita.
quote_english: Us against the world, I will protect you.

question_tagalog: Parehas ba tayong malapit sa kalikasan o sa siyudad?
question_english: Are we both close to nature or the city?
quote_tagalog: Ikaw lang ang view na paborito kong makita.
quote_english: You are the only view I love to see.

question_tagalog: Compatible ba yung trip natin na midnight snacks?
question_english: Are our trips for midnight snacks compatible?
quote_tagalog: Kakain tayo tuwing madaling araw na magkasama.
quote_english: We will eat every early morning together.

question_tagalog: Magkasundo ba tayo pag dating sa personal space issues?
question_english: Do we agree when it comes to personal space issues?
quote_tagalog: Bigyan natin ng healthy space para mamiss ang isa't isa.
quote_english: Let's give healthy space to miss each other.

question_tagalog: Pareho ba tayong mahilig mag-post sa social media about satin?
question_english: Are we both fond of posting on social media about us?
quote_tagalog: Private tayo, pero hindi secret relationship.
quote_english: We're private, but not a secret relationship.

question_tagalog: Tugma ba tayo pano gumastos sa luxuries in life?
question_english: Are we compatible on how to spend on luxuries in life?
quote_tagalog: Ikaw ang pinaka-luxurious na regalo ng buhay.
quote_english: You are life's most luxurious gift.

question_tagalog: Gaano tayo nagkakasundo kung ilan magiging pets natin in the future?
question_english: How well do we agree on how many pets we'll have in the future?
quote_tagalog: Puno ng pagmamahal ang bahay na may pets.
quote_english: A house with pets is full of love.

question_tagalog: Parehas ba tayong okay na walang ginagawa for the whole day?
question_english: Are we both okay with doing nothing for the whole day?
quote_tagalog: Ang saya humiga lang maghapon basta katabi ka.
quote_english: It's so fun just laying down all day beside you.

question_tagalog: Tugma ba tayo sa pananaw about the 'right timing' in life?
question_english: Do we match on views about 'right timing' in life?
quote_tagalog: Tayo ang magandang patunay ng tamang panahon.
quote_english: We are a beautiful proof of the right timing.

question_tagalog: Pareho ba tayo pano naha-handle ang anxiety and stress in real-time?
question_english: Are we the same in how we handle anxiety and stress in real-time?
quote_tagalog: Kumapit ka sakin, ako muna ang mag-isip ngayon.
quote_english: Hold onto me, I'll do the thinking for now.

question_tagalog: Magkasundo ba tayo sa style ng clothing natin, baduy man o hindi?
question_english: Do we agree on our clothing style, tacky or not?
quote_tagalog: Kahit anong suotin mo, gwapo/maganda ka parin sakin.
quote_english: Whatever you wear, you're still handsome/beautiful to me.

question_tagalog: Compatible ba yung sense ng independence natin at the same time clinginess?
question_english: Is our sense of independence and clinginess compatible at the same time?
quote_tagalog: Malaya ka, pero gusto kong nakadikit lang din.
quote_english: You're free, but I also want to stick to you.

question_tagalog: Pareho ba tayong hilig pag-usapan ang deep topics over superficial chika?
question_english: Do we both like discussing deep topics over superficial gossip?
quote_tagalog: Deep talks man o chismis, makikinig ako.
quote_english: Deep talks or gossip, I will listen.

question_tagalog: Tugma ba yung priorities natin right exactly directly purely perfectly at this age right now?
question_english: Do our priorities right exactly match completely directly completely right perfectly exactly correctly precisely currently at this age?
quote_tagalog: Goal natin ang peaceful at masayang buhay completely clearly exactly absolutely safely naturally completely.
quote_english: Our goal is a peaceful and happy life fully completely exactly absolutely clear pure strictly right full securely tightly.
